title: Dispatch Request v1
description: Request to dispatch a workflow instance for a handoff. Includes workflow template reference, target repository, and configuration for agent tier, decomposition, and dependencies. Producer: handoff system, operator. Consumer: canopy, dispatch engine.

handoff_path.description: Path to the handoff markdown file relative to project root (e.g., '.handoffs/hymenium/handoff-parser.md').

workflow_template.description: Reference to a workflow template ID (must exist in workflow-template-v1 contracts).

project_root.description: Absolute path to the workspace project root.

target_repo.description: Name of the target repository or subdirectory within project_root where changes should be made.

priority.description: Dispatch priority for scheduling and resource allocation.

agent_tier_override.description: Override the agent tier specified in the workflow template. Null means use template defaults.

decompose.description: If true, attempt to break the work into smaller independent pieces.

max_effort_per_piece.description: Maximum effort budget per decomposed piece (e.g., '30m', '2h'). Null means no limit.

depends_on.description: Array of workflow IDs (ULIDs) that must complete before this one can start.
